k m space equals square root of left parenthesis 6 square root of 2 right parenthesis ² space plus left parenthesis 6 right parenthesis ² end root end root
space space space space space equals square root of 72 space plus space 36 end root
space space space space space equals square root of 108
space space space space space equals 6 square root of 3
